title: Corpus: Affirm MLE II, Pinterest MLE II, WBD MLE II job postings (high-growth-public Junior/Associate bucket)
note: Corpus comp-extraction-by-tier/ml-engineer.json Junior/Associate bucket: 6 data points, 3 companies. Affirm MLE II ranges $123K-$225K across 4 postings; Pinterest MLE II $138.9K-$286K; WBD MLE II $112K. Corpus median $167K adjusted to $135K for realistic single-location p50.
